value="<b>COLLECTOR (Telegraf)</b><div><div style="text-align: left;">- Runs every 1 second (system metrics)</div><div style="text-align: left;">- Aggregates CPU, RAM, temperature, GPU, NPU telemetry</div><div style="text-align: left;">- Exposes on :9273/metrics (Prometheus format)</div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="560" x="280" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#00C7FD,#00C7FD);fontColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#040E35);strokeColor=none;" value="<div style=""><b>METRICS MANAGER (FastAPI)</b></div><div style=""><b><br></b></div><div style="text-align: justify;">REST API (:9090)&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;In-Memory Store<br></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /api/v1/metrics/simple<span style="white-space: pre;">	<span style="white-space: pre;">	</span></span>- JSON-serializable list per metric name</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /api/v1/metrics<span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>- Automatic cleanup (300s default)</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /api/v1/metrics/influx<span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>- Memory limit (100k default)</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /api/v1/metrics/otlp<span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>- Eviction on overflow</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /api/v1/metrics/latest</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /health</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /metrics</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div><div style="text-align: justify;">SSE Stream (:9090)</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- /metrics/stream (polls :9273 every 500ms)</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="560" x="280" y="540" as="geometry" />
